title: Payment terms ≤ 30 days
description: Ensures that payment terms are not excessive.
remediationTemplate: Consider negotiating for shorter payment terms to improve cash flow.

title: Service credits cap ≤ 10%/month
description: Limits the monthly cap on service credits.
remediationTemplate: The service credit cap is within the typical range.

title: Termination notice ≤ 60 days
description: Ensures a reasonable notice period for termination.
remediationTemplate: The termination notice period is standard.

title: GDPR clause present when EU personal data processed
description: Checks for a GDPR clause if EU personal data is involved.
semanticPrompt: Does this contract involve the processing of personal data of individuals in the European Union?
remediationTemplate: If EU personal data is processed, a GDPR-compliant data protection clause must be included.
